---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: 'Reporting guideline for the use of Generative Artificial intelligence tools
  in MEdical Research: the GAMER Statement'
acronym: GAMER
description: Standardised guideline for generative artificial intelligence use in
  medical research
doi: 10.1136/bmjebm-2025-113825
pmid-id: '[40360239](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40360239/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40360239/
relevant-urls: ''
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Luo X, Tham YC, Giuffrè M, Ranisch R, Daher M, Lam
  K, Eriksen AV, Hsu CW, Ozaki A, Moraes FY, Khanna S, Su KP, Begagić E, Bian Z, Chen
  Y, Estill J; GAMER Working Group. Reporting guideline for the use of Generative
  Artificial intelligence tools in MEdical Research: the GAMER Statement. BMJ Evid
  Based Med. 2025 May 13:bmjebm-2025-113825.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: ''
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: The GAMER Checklist is available in [Chinese](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/GAMER-checklist-Chinese-version.docx).
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: Read the full text of [GAMER](https://ebm.bmj.com/content/early/2025/05/13/bmjebm-2025-113825.long).
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
- Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
# - Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- No keywords provided

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
